exerciseDescription: Press weight on an incline bench to target upper chest.
Press weight on a decline bench to target lower chest.
Sit on a peck deck and move your arms into each other.
Lower and raise body using arms while keeping body straight.
Press weight on an bench press to target chest.
Stand centered between two high pulleys, grab the handles, and bring them inward with a slight forward lean.
Push weight away using legs on a machine.
Curl weight with legs to target hamstrings.
Extend legs to target quadriceps.
Raise heels to strengthen calves.
Postion bar on your front shoulders with palms faceing the sky, then squat.
Place bar on your shoulders behind your head, then make a squating motion.
Place hands in a mixed postion on top of a bar, then push your butt back while lowering the bar until it touches the ground .
Sit on a abdution machine and push legs toward each other.
Sit on a abdution machine and push legs away from each other.
Hold a barebell with both arms and then squat.
Postion youself on the edge of a bench with a bar on your hips, then trust upward
Hold barebells in both of your hands and then with one leg squat down then repeat with other leg
Pull bar down to chest to target lats.
Pull handle toward torso while seated.
Pull weighted bar toward chest in a bent stance.
Pull rope toward face to target upper back.
Postion yourself on a bench with your face toward the ground, then with one hand bring the barebell into your body then switch.
Sit on a pec deck with your chest facing the machine then move the handles behind your back
Lift arms to the sides to shoulder height.
Lift weights in front of body to shoulder height.
Raise arms outward to target rear shoulders.
Rotate and press weights overhead.
Lower and raise dumbells over your head
Put barbells in both hands then move them up to your face.
Curl weights with palms facing inward.
Curl weight using a preacher bench.
Curl using a cable machine for tension.
Curl using a barbell.
Push cable down to extend arms.
Lower weight toward forehead, then extend arms.
Lower and raise body using parallel bars.
Curl using a barbell, when at top rotate your arms with palms facing downward and finish.
Use a barebell with wirst on edge of bench and curl using your wrist .
Rotate torso side to side while seated.
Lift legs while lying down to target abs.
Drive knees toward chest in a plank position.
Alternate elbow to knee in a pedaling motion.
Get on a treadmill and run or walk.
Get on a treadmill and run or walk with an incline.
Get on a stairmaster and walk up steps.
